coach_note: Lorcan is on holiday in SE Asia — enjoying some well-earned downtime in the heat. Running is treadmill-only for now, keeping things ticking over with sessions like today's 400s (12.1km, avg HR 144, max 175). No pressure on volume or structure — this is maintenance mode. Full training resumes in April when he's back home. The big goal is Berlin Marathon in September, targeting sub-3:20. Lorcan has unfinished business after having to withdraw from Valencia Marathon last year. CTL is low at 5.3 — expected and totally fine. We have 5+ months to build properly once he's back. Enjoy the break.
